zh.lifeSummary: 當Marmaduke Darell於大約1144年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾瑟賽時，他的父親Thomas Darell29歲，母親Sarah Wyndham25歲。他於大約1166年與Aceria在英國越可爾瑟賽結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marmaduke Darell于大约1144年出生在英国英格兰越可爾瑟賽时，他的父亲Thomas Darell29岁，母亲Sarah Wyndham25岁。他于大约1166年与Aceria在英国越可爾瑟賽结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Darell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Marmaduke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is generally held to be an Anglicized form of the Old Irish name Mael-Maedóc ‘devotee of Maedóc’. The name Maedóc was borne by various early Irish saints, most notably a 6th-century abbot of Clonmore and a 7th-century bishop of Ferns. Mael-Maedóc Ó Morgair ( 1095–1148 ) was a reformer of the Church in Ireland and a friend of Bernard of Clairvaux. However, the modern Gaelic form (from c.1200 ) is Maol-Maodhóg (pronounced ‘mul-may-og’), so that the name would have had to have been borrowed into English before this loss of the d. Marmaduke has never been common except in Yorkshire, where for example it was bourne by Marmaduke Huby , abbot of Fountains, ( 1495–1526 ). Its most notable bearer in recent times has been Marmaduke Hussey ( 1923–2006 ), a former chairman of the governors of the BBC.

en.lifeSummary: When Marmaduke Darell was born about 1144, in Sessay, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Darell, was 29 and his mother, Sarah Wyndham, was 25. He married Aceria about 1166, in Sessay, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marmaduke Darell est né environ 1144, à Sessay, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Darell, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Sarah Wyndham, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Aceria environ 1166, à Sessay, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marmaduke Darell um 1144 in Sessay, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Darell 29 und seine Mutter Sarah Wyndham 25. Er hat um 1166 in Sessay, Yorkshire, England Aceria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marmaduke Darell è nato il circa 1144 nel Sessay, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Darell, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Wyndham, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Aceria circa 1166, nel Sessay, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marmaduke Darellが約1144年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアセッサイで生まれた時，父Thomas Darellは29歳，母Sarah Wyndhamは25歳であった。約1166年にイギリスヨークシュアイアセッサイでAceriaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Marmaduke Darell(이)가 대략 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 세지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Darell(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Wyndham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1166년 영국 요르크실르 세지에서 Aceria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marmaduke Darell nasceu aproximadamente 1144, em Sessay, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Darell, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Wyndham, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Aceria aproximadamente 1166, em Sessay, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marmaduke Darell родился около 1144 г. в местности сессеи, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Darell было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Wyndham, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Aceria около 1166 г. в местности сессеи, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marmaduke Darell nació aproximadamente 1144, en Sessay, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Darell, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Sarah Wyndham, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Aceria aproximadamente 1166, en Sessay, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
